name: Time Nor Tide - Lee Kuan Yew
original_name: Time Nor Tide - Lee Kuan Yew
overview: Witness how Lee Kuan Yew’s early life under British colonial rule and the Japanese Occupation shaped his world view and spurred him to lead his fellow countrymen towards Independence. Despite its size as 'a little red dot' on the map, through Mr Lee Kuan Yew's influence on the international arena, he put Singapore on the world map.

trailers.title: TIME NOR TIDE: REMEMBERING LEE KUAN YEW
